name: favorite_toggle
_note: favorite_toggle pins/unpins a recipe for the caller (per-user STATE Map). A missing recipeId rejects with 'recipeId required'. First toggle on a recipeId returns favorited:true; toggling the same id again returns favorited:false. count is the caller's current favorite total. Live-DB+actor reality: drives the real globalThis._concordSTATE favorites map keyed by ctx.actor.id, never no_db.
